currentAssumptions: No third-party analytics SDK is currently declared.
AI model and video generation providers are called from the server side only.
Android native package currently declares INTERNET permission only.
Future photo library, file saving, share, camera, microphone, push notification, or analytics plugins must be reviewed before release.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Privacy Details
appliesTo: privacy policy and privacy choices links

officialBasis.name: Google Play app account deletion requirements

dataFlows.name: Account and authentication
dataFlows.source: User registration and login forms plus server session management.
dataFlows.sharingNotes: Do not share with advertising, analytics, or data broker services. Hosting and database infrastructure may process this data as service providers.
storedWhere: server in-memory or persistent session store
dataFlows.retention: Keep while the account exists. Retain limited security records only if required by law, dispute handling, fraud prevention, or operational security.
dataFlows.exportAndDeletion: Covered by /api/account/export and /api/account/data-rights-request. Production deletion workflow must remove or anonymize associated account records after verification.

dataFlows.name: User uploaded product materials
dataFlows.source: Create flow, batch import, assets library, selection-product material upload, and account/person asset upload.
dataFlows.sharingNotes: May be sent to configured AI model, image understanding, video generation, storage, or hosting providers only to complete user-requested tasks.
storedWhere: local or cloud object storage in production
dataFlows.retention: Keep until the user deletes the account/data or until the published retention schedule removes old runs and assets.
dataFlows.exportAndDeletion: Account export should include asset metadata. Production deletion workflow must remove stored files, database rows, and provider-side retained files where supported.

dataFlows.name: AI generated prompts and video results
dataFlows.source: AI workflow execution, video runs, batch jobs, LibTV jobs, and generated output listing.
dataFlows.sharingNotes: Generated content may be returned by third-party AI/video services and stored by configured cloud infrastructure for display and download.
storedWhere: provider-side task result storage depending on production provider
dataFlows.retention: Keep while needed for user history, downloads, issue review, and compliance evidence. Final retention period is a release blocker.
dataFlows.exportAndDeletion: Account export includes task and output summaries. Production deletion workflow must delete or unlink generated content where possible.

dataFlows.name: Workflow activity and usage records
dataFlows.source: Task APIs, batch APIs, run history, video-run history, compliance check, and server logs.
dataFlows.sharingNotes: Do not share with advertising or tracking partners. Cloud logging/hosting vendors may process this data as service providers.
dataFlows.retention: Keep for operational troubleshooting, quota reconciliation, and user task history. Production retention window must be published.
dataFlows.exportAndDeletion: Export includes summaries. Deletion workflow must remove user-linked task records unless retained for legitimate security, legal, or billing reasons.

dataFlows.name: Diagnostics and technical health data
dataFlows.source: Server health checks, app error handling, operational logs, and release readiness checks.
dataFlows.sharingNotes: Production hosting, observability, and crash-reporting vendors must be added here if enabled.
dataFlows.retention: Keep for a short operational window. Final log retention and redaction policy is a release blocker.
dataFlows.exportAndDeletion: Generally not user-facing unless linked to an account. User-linked diagnostics should be removable or anonymized during account deletion.

dataFlows.name: Local app preferences
dataFlows.sharingNotes: Currently stored on device only unless a future sync feature sends these preferences to the server.
dataFlows.retention: Controlled by browser storage clearing or app reinstall. Must be reviewed if synced to cloud later.
dataFlows.exportAndDeletion: Not included in server export because it is not currently collected by the server.

applePrivacyNutritionLabelDraft.trackingNotes: No advertising SDK, advertising identifier use, data broker sharing, or cross-app targeted advertising is currently planned. Re-review before adding analytics, ads, social login, or attribution SDKs.
reviewBeforeSubmission: Confirm whether username can contain email and whether Apple should treat it as Contact Info.
Confirm whether production logs store IP address or device identifiers.
Confirm every AI, hosting, storage, observability, and payment provider before App Store Connect submission.
Confirm no third-party code collects data for analytics, advertising, or tracking.

googlePlayDataSafetyDraft.dataSharingNotes: User-uploaded and AI-generated content may be shared with service providers only to deliver AI/video generation and hosting. No advertising or data broker sharing is planned.
reviewBeforeSubmission: Confirm the public web deletion URL remains reachable: https://www.zkraiflow.top/legal/delete-account.html.
Confirm HTTPS is enforced for every production API endpoint.
Confirm whether production logs collect IP address and whether that should be declared.
Confirm all service providers and SDKs, including AI model providers, storage, hosting, observability, crash reporting, payment, and analytics if added.
Add the Analytics purpose only if production user activity is collected to understand app usage or performance beyond task operation, quota, support, or security needs.
Confirm that account deletion removes associated user data or clearly discloses lawful retention exceptions.

thirdPartyReview.name: xlsx
thirdPartyReview.dataCollectionRisk: parses user-provided spreadsheet files in app workflow; no separate network transfer is declared by the library itself

thirdPartyReview.name: Capacitor core/android/ios
thirdPartyReview.dataCollectionRisk: container itself does not add analytics in current project; native permissions and plugins must be reviewed whenever added

thirdPartyReview.name: Production AI model and video providers
thirdPartyReview.dataCollectionRisk: may receive user uploads, prompts, task parameters, and generated outputs to service user requests

permissions.purpose: Connect to the app server, authentication APIs, AI workflow APIs, support/legal pages, and generated result downloads.
Upload product images or save generated results if native plugins are added.
Not currently required. Add only if users can take product photos inside the app.
Not currently required. Review if task completion notifications are added.

releaseBlockers: Replace every TODO public URL, contact email, and support phone before store submission.
Publish final privacy policy, terms, AI disclosure, support, and account deletion pages on HTTPS.
Confirm the final AI/video providers, hosting, storage, logging, crash reporting, payment, analytics, and domestic distribution SDK list.
Define and publish retention periods for accounts, uploaded files, generated outputs, task history, logs, and deletion requests.
Verify production account deletion removes account data and associated files or clearly discloses any lawful retention exceptions.
Confirm production HTTPS, secure cookies, CORS origins, and server-side secret handling.
Re-run privacy review whenever native permissions, analytics, ads, attribution, social login, payment, push notification, camera, microphone, or location features are added.
